name: 30 GM Lignocaine Hydrochloride Gel USP
about: 30 GM Lignocaine Hydrochloride Gel USP is a cream-based product that is easy to use and suitable for all skin types. It comes in a white color and should be stored in a dry place. This product is ideal for those who need pain relief during medical procedures or minor surgeries. It contains Lignocaine Hydrochloride, which is a local anesthetic that helps to numb the area and prevent pain. This gel is fast-acting and provides relief within minutes of application. It can also be used for dental procedures, injections, and minor skin procedures.

faq.q: What is Lignocaine Hydrochloride Gel USP?
faq.a: Lignocaine Hydrochloride Gel USP is a cream-based product that contains a local anesthetic to provide pain relief during medical procedures or minor surgeries.

faq.q: Can it be used for all skin types?
faq.a: Yes, this product is suitable for all skin types.
